mapper.insert: INSERT INTO node_data_exchange_log ( exchange_id, source_organ_id, source_organ_name, target_organ_id, target_organ_name, exchange_type, data_type, data_id, data_name, data_size, status, error_msg, retry_count, started_at, is_del, create_date ) VALUES ( #{exchangeId}, #{sourceOrganId}, #{sourceOrganName}, #{targetOrganId}, #{targetOrganName}, #{exchangeType}, #{dataType}, #{dataId}, #{dataName}, COALESCE(#{dataSize}, 0), COALESCE(#{status}, 0), #{errorMsg}, COALESCE(#{retryCount}, 0), #{startedAt}, 0, NOW() )
mapper.update:
UPDATE node_data_exchange_log
source_organ_name = #{sourceOrganName}, target_organ_name = #{targetOrganName}, data_name = #{dataName}, data_size = #{dataSize}, status = #{status}, error_msg = #{errorMsg}, retry_count = #{retryCount}, completed_at = #{completedAt}, duration_ms = #{durationMs},
WHERE id = #{id} AND is_del = 0
UPDATE node_data_exchange_log SET is_del = 1 WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM node_data_exchange_log WHERE id = #{id} AND is_del = 0
SELECT * FROM node_data_exchange_log WHERE exchange_id = #{exchangeId} AND is_del = 0 LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM node_data_exchange_log WHERE source_organ_id = #{sourceOrganId} AND is_del = 0 ORDER BY create_date DESC
SELECT * FROM node_data_exchange_log WHERE target_organ_id = #{targetOrganId} AND is_del = 0 ORDER BY create_date DESC
SELECT * FROM node_data_exchange_log WHERE status = 2 AND is_del = 0 ORDER BY create_date DESC
SELECT * FROM node_data_exchange_log WHERE status = 0 AND is_del = 0 ORDER BY create_date ASC

SELECT COUNT(*) as totalCount, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as successCount, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 2 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as failureCount, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as pendingCount, SUM(data_size) as totalDataSize, AVG(duration_ms) as avgDurationMs FROM node_data_exchange_log WHERE is_del = 0
AND (source_organ_id = #{organId} OR target_organ_id = #{organId})

SELECT * FROM node_data_exchange_log WHERE ( (source_organ_id = #{sourceOrganId} AND target_organ_id = #{targetOrganId}) OR (source_organ_id = #{targetOrganId} AND target_organ_id = #{sourceOrganId}) ) AND is_del = 0 ORDER BY create_date DESC
SELECT * FROM node_data_exchange_log WHERE create_date >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL #{days} DAY) AND is_del = 0 ORDER BY create_date DESC
